name: Catford
tagline: Vibrant community, excellent value, superb transport
overview: Catford is one of South East London's most exciting areas, offering excellent value, a thriving high street, and outstanding transport links via Catford and Catford Bridge stations.
transport: Catford station — London Bridge in 15 mins
Multiple bus routes to central London
Cycle routes to Greenwich and Lewisham
marketInsights: Catford has seen strong price growth as buyers discover its value compared to neighbouring areas. Average house prices remain competitive, with Victorian terraces and modern developments both in demand.

name: Lee
overview: Lee offers a delightful village atmosphere with tree-lined streets, independent boutiques, and excellent schools — all within easy reach of central London.
transport: Lee station — London Bridge in 12 mins
Bus routes to Greenwich and Lewisham
Easy access to A205 South Circular
marketInsights: Lee commands premium prices for period properties and family homes. Strong demand from families and professionals relocating from Zone 1 keeps the market buoyant.

name: Hither Green
overview: Hither Green is a sought-after residential enclave known for its leafy streets, excellent schools, and strong community spirit — a hidden gem in South East London.
transport: Hither Green station — Charing Cross in 20 mins
Bus 273 to Lewisham and Tower Bridge
marketInsights: Hither Green consistently attracts families seeking space and schools. Detached and semi-detached homes achieve strong prices, with limited stock keeping demand high.

name: Lewisham
overview: Lewisham is undergoing exciting regeneration, with new developments, improved transport, and a vibrant cultural scene making it one of London's most dynamic boroughs.
transport: Lewisham DLR — Canary Wharf in 15 mins
Lewisham station — London Bridge in 10 mins
Elizabeth line connections at Canary Wharf
marketInsights: Lewisham offers diverse property from Victorian terraces to luxury riverside apartments. Strong rental demand and ongoing regeneration support continued growth.
